title: Housing.com is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Housing.com is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Housing.com family as a Full Stack Developer in Agra. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Housing.com:
Housing.com is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Housing.com!
